coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 54-group, 1,662-node closure.
validation: The authored, solid-bracket, half-screw, and split-for-print cases now match Blender exactly with identical four-decimal local bounds. Split-for-print reproduces both Exact Boolean halves at 2,172 / 2,057 and 2,210 / 2,095, the joined fastener at 4,382 / 4,152, the healed screw at 893 / 1,192, and the final result at 1,805 / 1,819. The authored high-resolution hull remains exact at 168 / 86, the shared Heal Mesh output at 831 / 1,189, and the bracket shell at 912 / 627. The compact-diameter hull and first cut also match Blender's 373 / 497 and 648 / 622 totals; only its second-cut delta remains, giving 1,772 / 1,984 versus 1,807 / 1,973 (1.94% vertices, 0.56% faces).
